title: UnstableCraft
description: A chaotic modpack with every mod imaginable.
body:
# ![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6725008db401f1de4b8be3ff8324a9a606f9f112.png)

## About

A chaotic modpack with every mod imaginable, inspired by CrazyCraft or InsaneCraft. This is a personal modpack for some friends of mine on a server, but I might as well make some ad revenue money off of it. We wanted the server to be a loser's version of the Unstable SMP, but that didn't work out, but in remembrance of the original idea, it is called UnstableCraft. Contrary to the name, I hope to make the modpack as stable as I can.

## Performance & Stability

I want to make this modpack as stable and performant as possible, but with the large amount of mods I plan to add, I cannot guarantee that it will work well on lower-end pcs. If your pc cannot run this pack I suggsest trying [UnstableCraft Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unstablecraft-lite-cc), a version of the modpack only with performance, minimal utilities, and every server-side mod.

## Content

As of now, this modpack has mostly utility related mods. I plan to update the pack with content related mods in the future. Mods like [Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm), [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis), [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest), [BetterX Mods](https://modrinth.com/organization/betterx), and [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization/versions), are planned.

## Multiplayer

This modpack was made for a private server, but if the pack gets popular I might make a public server for it. But for now, using [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) to host your own worlds or making your own server is reccomended. If a public server ever happens, it will be after the modpack gets most of it's content mods. [UnstableCraft Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unstablecraft-lite-cc) will also be compatible like I said before.
